NYMIERA:\\ts[1] This is the story of how: NYMIERA:\ts[1] This is the story of how the world came into being.
\\ts[1]A tale that tells the base of all: \ts[1]A tale that tells the base of all life. Good and evil.
NYMIERA:\\ts[1] In the beginning of time: NYMIERA:\ts[1] In the beginning of time, there was a single deity.
\\ts[1]A being so powerful and great, th: \ts[1]A being so powerful and great, that light itself would bend at its presence.
\\ts[1]The being was a kind, and benevol: \ts[1]The being was a kind, and benevolent spirit.
\\ts[1]But it was also very lonely. It w: \ts[1]But it was also very lonely. It wished for companions to love. Creatures that would flourish under its light.
\\ts[1]Because it demanded it, a woman a: \ts[1]Because it demanded it, a woman and a man were born into the world.
\\ts[1]The deity thought of the man and: \ts[1]The deity thought of the man and the woman as its own children.
\\ts[1]Proud of its creation, it bestowe: \ts[1]Proud of its creation, it bestowed the gift of intelligence.
\\ts[1]Alongside intelligence, they were: \ts[1]Alongside intelligence, they were given free will.
\\ts[1]Both decided to dedicate their li: \ts[1]Both decided to dedicate their lives to worshiping and praising their creator.
\\ts[1]Everyone loved one another. The m: \ts[1]Everyone loved one another. The man and the woman married and lived their lives under the powerful deity's protection.
\\ts[1]Life was a paradise. Together, th: \ts[1]Life was a paradise. Together, the man and the woman would build a family.
\\ts[1]And lead the way for the rest of: \ts[1]And lead the way for the rest of humanity to prosper.
NYMIERA:\\ts[1] After this deity created: NYMIERA:\ts[1] After this deity created humanity, it wished to bring new life.
\\ts[1]Life which would stand equally to: \ts[1]Life which would stand equally to humans. Hand in hand.
NYMIERA:\\ts[1] Using its powerful light: NYMIERA:\ts[1] Using its powerful light, it created new beings.
\\ts[1]They were all different shapes, s: \ts[1]They were all different shapes, sizes, color... They were perfect.
\ts[1]The deity named them\| Pokémon.  \ts[1]Pokémon had wondrous abilities.  Some could shoot fire. Some could control things with their minds!
\\ts[1]Some could generate water! Some c: \ts[1]Some could generate water! Some could even create imaginary worlds and illusions!
NYMIERA:\\ts[1] Their God's creation soo: NYMIERA:\ts[1] Their God's creation soon flooded their gates.
\\ts[1]From the north, the west, the sou: \ts[1]From the north, the west, the south, and the east... All were welcome!
\\ts[1]All were precious beings that wer: \ts[1]All were precious beings that were given life. That's how the woman saw them.
\\ts[1]But the man... No, he thought dif: \ts[1]But the man... No, he thought differently.
NYMIERA:\ts[1] "We don't need Pokémon. Humans are the superior beings!"
\\ts[1]\"Why allow Pokémon to wield such: \ts[1]"Why allow Pokémon to wield such power, but us humans cannot?"
\\ts[1]\"Why do you put us below Pokémon: \ts[1]"Why do you put us below Pokémon?! You've made a mistake, \|Father!!"
NYMIERA:\\ts[1] The deity would not succ: NYMIERA:\ts[1] The deity would not succumb to the man's anger.
\\ts[1]\"Pokémon and people are one and: \ts[1]"Pokémon and people are one and the same. Equal beings that both roam the earth in unity."
NYMIERA:\\ts[1] The man rejected this no: NYMIERA:\ts[1] The man rejected this notion, and decided to leave the woman and the deity. Forever.
NYMIERA:\\ts[1] The woman tried to persu: NYMIERA:\ts[1] The woman tried to persuade the man to stay, but he wouldn't budge.
\\ts[1]His stance was unshaken. He would: \ts[1]His stance was unshaken. He would not allow his former God to ruin what he thought he had.
NYMIERA:\\ts[1] Not long after, tragedy: NYMIERA:\ts[1] Not long after, tragedy struck.
\\ts[1]Out of nowhere, a meteor struck t: \ts[1]Out of nowhere, a meteor struck the deity, splitting the being into three.
\\ts[1]The meteor dragged one fragment f: \ts[1]The meteor dragged one fragment far away.
\\ts[1]The second fragment was mortally: \ts[1]The second fragment was mortally wounded. It could not hold its form for long.
\\ts[1]As for the final one... The last: \ts[1]As for the final one... The last fragment took a new name.
\\ts[1]It is what we know today as Arceu: \ts[1]It is what we know today as Arceus.
\\ts[1]Although it survived the impact,: \ts[1]Although it survived the impact, it was greatly weakened.
\\ts[1]Arceus agonized over the thought: \ts[1]Arceus agonized over the thought of future dangers that may befall his children.
\\ts[1]Arceus told the woman, \"I cannot: \ts[1]Arceus told the woman, "I cannot stay the way I am for much longer.
\\ts[1]But I shall grant upon you, a fin: \ts[1]But I shall grant upon you, a final gift.
\\ts[1]An object that will act as the co: \ts[1]An object that will act as the conduit between life and my power.
\\ts[1]An object that will bend the worl: \ts[1]An object that will bend the world to its owner's bidding.
\\ts[1]Take it, and store it away. Until: \ts[1]Take it, and store it away. Until then, await my reawakening.
\\ts[1]I leave the world in the hands of: \ts[1]I leave the world in the hands of you all. My beloved children. I shall be watching."
\\ts[1]And thus, Arceus formed itself in: \ts[1]And thus, Arceus formed itself into an object we call \c[6]The Archetype.
\\ts[1]It was the embodiment of Arceus': \ts[1]It was the embodiment of Arceus' love. A physical manifestation.
NYMIERA:\\ts[1] The man and the woman kn: NYMIERA:\ts[1] The man and the woman knew if its existence was found out, it would only create chaos.
\\ts[1]Both of them took The Archetype a: \ts[1]Both of them took The Archetype and sealed it away.
\\ts[1]They promised that they would not: \ts[1]They promised that they would not use The Archetype for their own selfish desires.
\\ts[1]And it rested peacefully. Awaitin: \ts[1]And it rested peacefully. Awaiting the day that Arceus would return to its people once again.
NYMIERA:\\ts[1] Though the two created t: NYMIERA:\ts[1] Though the two created their pact, it was broken soon after.
\\ts[1]The man grew lustful for The Arch: \ts[1]The man grew lustful for The Archetype's power.
\\ts[1]He stormed the woman's castle. He: \ts[1]He stormed the woman's castle. He demanded that the woman surrender.
\\ts[1]The woman refused, and locked in: \ts[1]The woman refused, and locked in combat with the man.
\\ts[1]This feud began the first Pokémon: \ts[1]This feud began the first Pokémon war.
\\ts[1]When other regions gained knowled: \ts[1]When other regions gained knowledge of The Archetype, they joined as well.
\\ts[1]One war became two, two became fo: \ts[1]One war became two, two became four, four became eight...
\\ts[1]And before long, the entirety of: \ts[1]And before long, the entirety of the world had become nothing but pain and suffering.
\\ts[1]The woman, now Queen, and her son: \ts[1]The woman, now Queen, and her son, now a Knight, fought for the safety of all beings.
\\ts[1]All who entered the castle fell t: \ts[1]All who entered the castle fell to the Knight's hand.
\\ts[1]But even then, the effect of war: \ts[1]But even then, the effect of war pressed down deeply on the woman's heart.
\\ts[1]Countless lives lost for nothing: \ts[1]Countless lives lost for nothing more than lust for power.
\\ts[1]The war was at a standstill, at t: \ts[1]The war was at a standstill, at this rate, the entirety of the world would soon be nothing.
\\ts[1]Tired and determined, the woman t: \ts[1]Tired and determined, the woman took matters into her own hands.
NYMIERA:\\ts[1] The woman made her way t: NYMIERA:\ts[1] The woman made her way to her castle with the past behind her.
\\ts[1]She could no longer look back. Th: \ts[1]She could no longer look back. The deaths of her family and her friends pushed her forward.
\\ts[1]Her resolve was all that she need: \ts[1]Her resolve was all that she needed to make the final move.
NYMIERA:\\ts[1] She took The Archetype a: NYMIERA:\ts[1] She took The Archetype and gave her wish.
\\ts[1]\"Bring this war to an end! Give: \ts[1]"Bring this war to an end! Give us the power we need to stop this!"
NYMIERA:\\ts[1] Her words echoed through: NYMIERA:\ts[1] Her words echoed through the sky, and finally, The Archetype responded with an empty glow.
NYMIERA:\\ts[1] The Archetype did someth: NYMIERA:\ts[1] The Archetype did something the woman did not expect.
\\ts[1] It had seemed as though her wish: \ts[1] It had seemed as though her wish backfired.
\\ts[1]Suddenly, the humans began to evo: \ts[1]Suddenly, the humans began to evolve. They became stronger, more intelligent.
\\ts[1]Pokémon fell in power, and humani: \ts[1]Pokémon fell in power, and humanity began to overwhelm them.
\\ts[1]The woman and her son were pushed: \ts[1]The woman and her son were pushed back into their castle.
\\ts[1]Her son fought valiantly, but he: \ts[1]Her son fought valiantly, but he succumbed to his wounds in battle and perished.
\\ts[1]The man presented his sword to th: \ts[1]The man presented his sword to the woman, in mockery.
\\ts[1]The woman had given up. Hope was: \ts[1]The woman had given up. Hope was lost.
\ts[1]Her beloved God had betrayed her. Her husband turned on her. Her only child was killed in battle.
\\ts[1]As she surrendered, a bright flas: \ts[1]As she surrendered, a bright flash of light enveloped the sky.
NYMIERA:\\ts[1] A man named AZ from a fa: NYMIERA:\ts[1] A man named AZ from a far off region had fired the Ultimate Weapon.
\\ts[1]Its purpose was to destroy all si: \ts[1]Its purpose was to destroy all sides of the war.
\\ts[1]The blast was so strong that it p: \ts[1]The blast was so strong that it pierced the sky and flew into space.
\\ts[1]The blast then rebounded and made: \ts[1]The blast then rebounded and made its way back to earth.
\\ts[1]In the light of that confusion, t: \ts[1]In the light of that confusion, the woman pulled back her bow and shot one final arrow.
\\ts[1]And the blast from the Ultimate W: \ts[1]And the blast from the Ultimate Weapon,\| ended\| it\| all.
\"NYMIERA: If you are reading this, then: "NYMIERA: If you are reading this, then I hope it has reached my descendants.
Rejoice my kin, as a new era has come up: Rejoice my kin, as a new era has come upon us!
In this letter, I bring knowledge that y: In this letter, I bring knowledge that you must know and remember.
I will tell you this hidden tale that I: I will tell you this hidden tale that I have hidden from everyone in this world.
Or so... that's what I've told.
NYMIERA: Upon its destruction, a soul fe: NYMIERA: Upon its destruction, a soul fell from the heavens.
It had landed in front of me, as if it w: It had landed in front of me, as if it was destined to.
A voice called out from this wandering s: A voice called out from this wandering soul and said...
\"???: Nymiera, my child. Please listen: "???: Nymiera, my child. Please listen well... I don't have much time to speak.
My name is Adrest, the third being in th: My name is Adrest, the third being in the trifecta of this world's deity.
Please bring my soul to the Grotto's Gro: Please bring my soul to the Grotto's Grounds. Lay my soul to rest and heal.
NYMIERA: I did as I was told. I brought: NYMIERA: I did as I was told. I brought the soul to the Grotto, and sealed the soul of Arceus deep within.
The voice then spoke once more...
\"ADREST: I shall lay here for the rest: "ADREST: I shall lay here for the rest of eternity-- Until one day, when this world needs me again, I shall reawaken.
And I will inhabit the being that set me: And I will inhabit the being that set me free. Together, we shall bring peace to this world again.
Keep this a secret, even from your famil: Keep this a secret, even from your family, until the time is right.
Hope for this world is not yet lost.\": Hope for this world is not yet lost."
\"NYMIERA: Quite recently, a trainer has: "NYMIERA: Quite recently, a trainer has visited me.
I believe they said their name was \PN. This person... hosts the soul of Adrest.
I felt it... No, I saw it. I saw him. Re: I felt it... No, I saw it. I saw him. Resting within \PN's soul.
Adrest has been set free, and if that is: Adrest has been set free, and if that is the case, this world has already been reset.
Please, bring \\PN to the Obelisk. If Ad: Please, bring \PN to the Obelisk. If Adrest is to wake up from his sleep, it should present itself to you.
To you and your family of the future. I: To you and your family of the future. I bid you farewell one final time.
I love you all, and... Good luck.\": I love you all, and... Good luck."
???: Have you calmed down? We need to ge: ???: Have you calmed down? We need to get back out there.
If we don't, Ren, Huey and Reina won't l: If we don't, Ren, Huey and Reina won't last... It's up to us.
???:\ts[1] Yes... I think I'm okay now.
???:\\ts[1] That was selfish of me, I'm: ???:\ts[1] That was selfish of me, I'm sorry.
???: It's okay! \\|We're all here for yo: ???: It's okay! \|We're all here for you. C'mon, let's wake up now.
???: ...\\v[12]? Thanks for being there: ???: ...\v[12]? Thanks for being there for me.
